title: Tubella broadwayi
taxonomy: Tubella broadwayi is a species of sea anemone. It is classified under the phylum Cnidaria, which also includes corals and jellyfish. Tubella broadwayi belongs to the class Anthozoa, a group of cnidarians that are primarily sessile. This species specifically falls under the order Actiniaria, which comprises the sea anemones. Tubella broadwayi's classification also includes the family Tubediniidae.
